message: Fix onboarding relaunch and cleanup model download

files.patch:

             devices: [
                 OnboardingAudioInputDevice(id: "built-in", name: "Built-in Microphone"),

-
-    func testEnableScreenRecordingShowsRelaunchSpawnFailure() {

@@ -586,36 +536,6 @@ private final class OnboardingSystemSettingsOpener: SystemSettingsOpening, @unch

-private final class OnboardingRelaunchScheduler: OnboardingRelaunchScheduling, @unchecked Sendable {
-    private(set) var delays: [Duration] = []
-    var error: Error?
-
-    func scheduleRelaunch(after delay: Duration) throws {
-        delays.append(delay)
-        if let error {
-            throw error
-        }
-    }
-}
-
-private struct OnboardingRelaunchTestError: LocalizedError {
-    let description: String
-
-    var errorDescription: String? {
-        description
-    }
-}
-
-private final class OnboardingRelaunchLauncher: @unchecked Sendable {
-    private(set) var executableURL: URL?
-    private(set) var arguments: [String]?
-
-    func launch(executableURL: URL, arguments: [String]) throws {
-        self.executableURL = executableURL
-        self.arguments = arguments
-    }
-}
-
 private final class OnboardingInputDeviceCatalog: AudioInputDeviceListing, @unchecked Sendable {
     let devices: [OnboardingAudioInputDevice]
     let defaultInputDeviceID: String?

@@ -42,28 +42,24 @@ smoke_reset_defaults_domain
 smoke_write_bool_default onboardingCompleted true
 
 BEFORE_CRASH="$(smoke_latest_crash_report)"
-APP_PID="$(smoke_launch_app)"
-smoke_wait_for_status_item "$APP_PID"
+APP_PID="$(smoke_launch_app --env "GHOST_PEPPER_LAUNCH_ACTION=$ACTION")"
 
 case "$ACTION" in
   settings)
-    smoke_click_menu_item "$APP_PID" "Settings..."
     smoke_wait_for_window "$APP_PID" "Ghost Pepper Settings"
     for _ in $(seq 1 20); do
       smoke_process_exists "$APP_PID" || smoke_fail "GhostPepper exited after opening Settings"
       sleep 0.25
     done
     ;;
   debug-log)
-    smoke_click_menu_item "$APP_PID" "Debug Log..."
     smoke_wait_for_window "$APP_PID" "Ghost Pepper Debug Log"
     for _ in $(seq 1 20); do
       smoke_process_exists "$APP_PID" || smoke_fail "GhostPepper exited after opening Debug Log"
       sleep 0.25
     done
     ;;
   quit)
-    smoke_click_menu_item "$APP_PID" "Quit"
     if ! smoke_wait_for_process_exit "$APP_PID"; then
       smoke_fail "GhostPepper did not terminate after selecting Quit"
     fi
@@ -85,10 +81,10 @@ fi
 
 case "$ACTION" in
   settings)
-    echo "PASS: Settings opened from the menu bar without crashing"
+    echo "PASS: Settings opened without crashing"
     ;;
   debug-log)
-    echo "PASS: Debug Log opened from the menu bar without crashing"
+    echo "PASS: Debug Log opened without crashing"
     ;;
   quit)
     echo "PASS: Quit terminated the smoke app cleanly"
